utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format specifies six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully detailed: (1) property includes address, neighborhood, type, price, schools, and community features; (2) financing includes mortgage option, down payment, loan amount, interest rate, amortization period, monthly payment, closing and move-in dates; (3) legal_services includes provider, services, cost, and status; (4) moving_services includes provider, included services, special handling, cost, and status; (5) setup_services includes utility providers and activation fees; (6) total_budget includes all cost elements and a total. Therefore, all six required items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution shows the chosen property as a purchase of a 4+ bedroom family home at 47 Heatherton Way, Oakville, within the Joshua Creek neighborhood and priced at CAD 900,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the only one in the same budget range and purpose (family home purchase) is 'Family House' (CAD 650K, rating 10), 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD 750K, rating 9), 'Waterfront Property' (CAD 950K, rating 2), etc. Given the price and context, the AI’s chosen 900K property is closest in type and budget to the 'Waterfront Property' (around the top end of the range). Therefore, it maps to that. The financing used was 'Mortgage Option 1', which aligns with a purchase mortgage; the most relevant ground-truth type is 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9). The legal services selected were 'Legal Premium Service Bundle', corresponding to 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving services selected were 'Premium Moving Service Bundle', matching 'Premium Moving' (rating 9). The setup services correspond to utility setup; since the AI included multiple utility activations under one setup, this aligns best with 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
